name: AI Timesheet Generator from Gmail and Calendar to Google Sheets
description: Collects recent emails from Gmail, uses Claude AI to extract work activities and time estimates, compiles an automated timesheet, and writes structured time entries to Google Sheets with a Slack summary.

source.originalName: AI Timesheet Generator with Gmail, Calendar & GitHub to Google Sheets

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for reading work emails

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for timesheet notification

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for timesheet

timePeriod.description: Time period to analyze (e.g. 7d for last week)

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post timesheet summary

hourlyRate.description: Optional hourly rate for billing calculation

steps.name: Fetch email details for timesheet analysis
Compile email metadata for AI processing
Build Claude prompt for timesheet generation
Parse Claude output and strip fences
Build rows for Google Sheets timesheet
